opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I tripped on the driveway and took the skin clean off my knee — the stinging is agonising and I can't wash the gravel out of it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened about an hour ago and it hurts too much to clean properly; I'm worried about the dirt and gravel stuck in it and about it getting infected or scarring.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago, straight after I fell onto the concrete driveway
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour and it still stings badly
symptom_narrative.character: intense stinging and burning across the front of my knee; the skin is scraped off and it's raw and weeping clear fluid with a bit of pinpoint bleeding
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really painful — the sting is agonising, especially when clothing rubs on it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the front of my right knee
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping my leg straight so nothing touches the raw area
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: anything touching it, and clothing rubbing against it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: there's dirt and little bits of gravel stuck in the raw area that I can't get out, and the skin around it looks red
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can walk but I'm limping because of the pain when anything touches the wound

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; hasn't taken any pain relief yet; not sure when the last tetanus needle was — thinks it was a long time ago, probably more than ten years

objective_data_offered.value: a large raw graze on the front of the right knee, roughly palm-sized, weeping clear fluid with tiny spots of bleeding, with visible grit and gravel stuck in it and redness around the edge
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown over video/photo — appearance and depth cannot be confirmed and the wound cannot be probed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: the raw area is oozing clear/yellowish fluid but there is no thick pus, no red streak spreading up the leg, and no fever so far
